name: @platform/adapters-opentelemetry
description: OpenTelemetry adapter: distributed tracing, metrics export, and telemetry SDK implementation for the observability interface.

readme.summary: OpenTelemetry adapter: distributed tracing, metrics export, and telemetry SDK implementation for the observability interface.
responsibilities: Implement the observability tracer interface using the OpenTelemetry SDK
Configure OTLP exporter with collector endpoint from config-runtime
Auto-instrument HTTP, database, and queue spans where possible
Export platform metrics via the OTLP metrics exporter
nonResponsibilities: Does not define the observability interface (owned by observability)
Does not own error capture or alerting (owned by adapters-sentry)
Does not configure the OpenTelemetry Collector or Jaeger deployment
usage: Initialized once at application startup before any I/O occurs to ensure full instrumentation
Imported by platform packages needing explicit span creation
operationalNotes: SDK must be initialized before all other imports to enable auto-instrumentation
Collector endpoint and service name are resolved from config-runtime
